---
title: "Hakkımda"
sidebar: false 
---

![Profil Fotoğrafım ~Generated By Gemini~](assets/images/vesikalik_AI.png){fig-alt="*Generated By Gemini" fig-align="left" width="218"}

# Eğitim

-   B.S., Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, Atılım University, Turkey, 2015 - 2020.
-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Atılım University, Turkey, 2017 - 2021.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# İş Tecrübesi

## Employements

1.  Tusaş, Tedarik Zinciri Yönetimi, 2021-ongoing

## Internships

1.  ORS, Kalite Kontrol Stajyeri, 2018

2.  Erdemir, Sıcak Haddekane Kalite Güvence Stajyeri, 2019

3.  TSE, Kalite, 2020

# Competencies

-   Data Analysis (R, SQL)

-   Reporting & Documentation (Quarto)

-   Version Control (Git)

<!-- -->

-   Advanced Excel (Power Pivot, Power Query)

-   Dashboard & Data Visualization (Power BI)

-   Supply Chain & Procurement Analytics

# Hobbies

-   Reading (history, food culture, sustainability)

-   Traveling & cultural exploration

-   Cooking & food culture
